title: PolicyEndorsementRequest
description: Apply an endorsement to an Issued policy. Produces a new PolicyVersion + PolicyEndorsement row + re-materialized PolicyCoverageLine[] in a single transaction. See F0018-S0006.

effectiveDate.description: Endorsement effective date. Must fall within the policy term; backdated endorsements are allowed for in-term corrections.

premiumDelta.description: Signed change in total premium (can be negative). If omitted, server recomputes from coverage-line premiums.

lobAttributes.description: Dynamic endorsement-stage attributes. Persistence targets the resulting PolicyVersion plus the PolicyEndorsement row.

coverages.description: The full coverage set under the new version (replace-style). Endorsement re-materializes PolicyCoverageLine rows.
